prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
passage: Recently, local festivals has become very popular in Rome. Since 2006, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 417 more events related to local festivals.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
